overview.short: Santoshgad (also referred to as Tathavade, the name of the closest village) is a fort in Phaltan taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Santoshgad (also referred to as Tathavade, the name of the closest village) is a fort in Phaltan taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India. Santoshgad hill fort lies in the north-west corner of the Phaltan taluka, about 12 miles (19 km) south-west of Phaltan.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Diskal
topPlaces.description: Diskal is a village in the Satara district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is situated on the Pusegaon-Phaltan road in Khatav taluka.

topPlaces.name: Upalve
topPlaces.description: Upalve village is under the Phaltan Taluka, and district is Satara. It is located to the south of the Phaltan and beside the Sitamai, from where the River Banganga started.

topPlaces.name: Lalgun
topPlaces.description: Lalgun is a village in Khatav taluka of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located on Pusegaon-Phaltan State Highway (SH-147) and comes under Koregaon Assembly constituency and Satara Lok Sabha constituency.

items.note: Diskal is a village in the Satara district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is situated on the Pusegaon-Phaltan road in Khatav taluka.
Upalve village is under the Phaltan Taluka, and district is Satara. It is located to the south of the Phaltan and beside the Sitamai, from where the River Banganga started.

Lalgun is a village in Khatav taluka of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located on Pusegaon-Phaltan State Highway (SH-147) and comes under Koregaon Assembly constituency and Satara Lok Sabha constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Santoshgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Santoshgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Santoshgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Santoshgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Santoshgad?
faq.a: Stays in Santoshgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Santoshgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diskal, Upalve, Lalgun.
